zh.title: B.M.
zh.msg:
2026/05/05

- 新增公告系统...
- 每次进入游戏，自动更新B.M.验证数据。
- 游戏内禁止共用账号，检测间隔 30 分钟。
- B.M.服务记录 IP 地址，用于封禁异常账号。
- 最近有骗子倒卖B.M.相关资源，举报请联系我们。

* 以上内容为测试文本，以实际框架功能为准。

en.title: B.M.
en.msg:
2026/05/05

- Added announcement system...
- B.M. verification data is automatically updated on each game launch.
- Account sharing is prohibited in-game, with checks every 30 minutes.
- B.M. service records IP addresses to ban abnormal accounts.
- Recently there have been scammers reselling B.M. related resources. Please contact us to report.

* The above is test text, subject to actual framework functionality.

note: 检测 ver 变动才会跳公告 Klei商店 快来看看Klei商店最新上架的好东西吧！ http://store.kleientertainment.com
